article.title: Observability in Foundry Control Plane: Empowering Developers to Evaluate and Optimize AI Agents | Microsoft Community Hub

activityOfUser.occupation: Senior Software Engineer | GenAI Evaluation Platform @ Microsoft

posts.text:
🚀 Big news as we closed out Microsoft Ignite last week!

We’re thrilled to announce Observability in Foundry Control Plane, a game-changer for developers building and managing AI agents at scale.

Why does this matter? AI agents are powerful—but unpredictable. Ensuring trust, safety, and performance requires deep visibility across their lifecycle. 

That’s where Observability in the Microsoft Foundry comes in with the following capabilities:

✅ Integrated & Continuous Evaluations – Out-of-the-box and custom evaluators, synthetic datasets, and cluster analysis to accelerate reliable agent development.
✅ Unified Monitoring Dashboards – Track cost, performance, and safety with actionable insights.
✅ End-to-End Tracing – OpenTelemetry-based tracing for debugging every agent run.
✅ Fleet-Wide Oversight – Observe agents across Foundry and third-party frameworks in one view.
✅ AI Red Teaming Agent – Automate safety testing to harden generative AI systems.

CarMax joined us on stage to share how these capabilities help them monitor and optimize their AI agent, Skye—boosting confidence and accelerating innovation.

With these tools, organizations can evaluate, monitor, and optimize every agent responsibly and efficiently—from prototype to production.

👉 Dive deeper into the details: Read the full blog post: https://lnkd.in/g3QevZsi

#MicrosoftIgnite #AzureAI #MicrosoftFoundry #Observability #AIInnovation

comments.text: It looks fantastic on the surface, but how it's connected to other Microsoft Observability mechanisms, that Enterprises already implemented?

activityOfUser.occupation: Senior Software Engineer | GenAI Evaluation Platform @ Microsoft

posts.text:
🚀 VoteMate Preview is live! → votemate.io

This moment has been months in the making, and it only happened because of the incredible people I’ve been lucky enough to build with.

Change doesn’t happen alone - it takes a group of people willing to show up, put in the work, and believe in something bigger than themselves. Every late night, every brainstorming session, every line of code, every design sketch - it all came from this volunteer team. And we wouldn’t be here without them.

In just 10 months, together we’ve:
-Built VoteMate with 50+ volunteers and Responsible AI leaders from Microsoft and elsewhere, supported by Microsoft for Startups.
-Collaborated with Carnegie Mellon University - Heinz College of Information Systems and Public Policy on a Summer R&D program and Fall Capstone.
-Established partnerships with trusted civic nonprofits like Democracy Works and Vote Early Day.
-Secured Patent Pending status on our personalized ballot-building AI system.
-Brought a Preview product to life on minimal funding and zero debt - driven entirely by the heart and hustle of volunteers.

This Preview release is an early step - focused first on New Jersey and Virginia for upcoming elections - but it’s proof of what’s possible when people across backgrounds, professions, and beliefs come together around a shared purpose.

How you can support:
- Explore the platform at votemate.io
- Share it with friends, family, your network
- Send us your feedback through the app - every bit helps us grow!

I want to take a moment to celebrate and thank every single person who got us here. Words are not enough to express my gratitude!

Core Team
Alex Saxerud, David Rosenthal, Jayanta (Jay) Sen, Joel Partridge, Liz (Elizabeth) Walsh, Sierra Dowd, Valerie Robert, Amanda Molina

Engineering
Aaron Sweeney Catherine Bell Christopher Sims Corey Donahue eric nichols Janhavi Mahajan juhyun lee Paul Flanagan Richard Pressler Sunil Gudivada

GTM/Marketing
Clara Cox, MPA, Lane Hummel, Emily Kitching, Mitali Modi, Jessica Blair, Johanna Petruski

Founding Partners
Lisa Sullivan, Dan Sullivan , Kya Sainsbury-Carter, Brian O'Kelley, Jonathan Mars Jeff Lowinger

Board Members
Dr. Jennifer King, Dave Leichtman, Udi Milo, Ryan Germany, Shelby Summerfield

This is just the beginning - but this team shows what’s possible when we come together to change the world for the better.

🚀 Here we go!
